message:
fix: mission deep links broken on production (demo mode) (#4587)

MSW catch-all handler intercepted /api/missions/* requests with 503
"not available in demo mode" before they could reach the real Netlify
Functions. Add passthrough rules for missions-file and missions-browse
endpoints, matching the pattern already used for YouTube endpoints.

Fixes: https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-platform/issues/400#issuecomment-4185198545

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
